policy.siteMonitor: No laboratory-site crawler exists. Laboratory pages are heterogeneous and are read by a person, so no laboratory in this file claims an automated site monitor.
policy.linkCheck: The scheduled link monitor proves that a laboratory URL still resolves. A 200 response does not prove that the page still describes the intended laboratory, and it is never reported as a content check.
authorWatchTiers: orcid-exact: an ORCID identifier proven against the laboratory's own site or a corresponding-author statement. No laboratory qualifies yet.

author-plus-affiliation: a surname-plus-initial PubMed query constrained by current or recent affiliation. Reliable for low-collision names, and still capable of missing a paper published from a new affiliation.
manual-queue: the name is too common for a surname-plus-initial query to be safe, so new work is found by a person reading the laboratory's own outputs.
watchStates: active: the query has run in at least one completed refresh.
pending-first-run: the query was added in the round-2 pass and has not yet been executed by the refresh workflow.
policy.reviewInterval: Author-monitored laboratories are re-reviewed every six months. Manual-queue laboratories are re-reviewed every three months, because nothing automated will surface a change between reviews.

labs.note: Zou Y is a common abbreviated name; the Westlake affiliation constraint carries the identity claim.
Yamada KI plus the Kyushu affiliation.
Imai H is common; the Kitasato affiliation constraint carries the identity claim.
Conrad M plus Helmholtz or Munich.
Friedmann Angeli JP is a low-collision name, so no affiliation constraint is applied.
Olzmann JA plus Berkeley.
Kagan VE plus Pittsburgh.
Fedorova M is common in Slavic-language records; the Dresden constraint carries the identity claim.
Pratt DA plus Ottawa.
Rodriguez R is very common; the Institut Curie constraint carries the identity claim.
Mishima E plus Tohoku.
Yin H is very common; the City University of Hong Kong constraint carries the identity claim.
Stockwell BS plus Columbia.
Dixon SJ plus Stanford.
Papagiannakopoulos T is a low-collision name; the NYU constraint is a redundant safeguard.

Watch added in the round-2 pass. The affiliation clause spans Columbia and Pittsburgh because this laboratory has relocated; the query has not yet been executed.
Wang plus an initial is one of the highest-collision author strings in PubMed. No automated watch is safe until an ORCID is proven.
Jiang X collides heavily even inside one institution. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
Gan B collides with several unrelated authors. Manual until an ORCID is proven.

Chen Q is among the most collision-prone author strings in the index. Manual until an ORCID is proven. The stable official institutional page names Quan Chen as director; the strict link monitor resolved it with HTTP 200 in the 2026-07-23 UTC run and again in the round-3 run. It is an administration page, not a laboratory news feed, and reachability does not prove the page reports new work.
Saito Y is a common Japanese author string and shares an institution with another tracked laboratory. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
A two-principal-investigator record; an author query cannot express which principal investigator led a given paper. Manual by design.
Gao plus an initial is high-collision. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
A two-letter surname produces unusable author queries. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
Kang plus an initial is high-collision across Korean and Chinese records. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
A two-principal-investigator record with two high-collision surnames. Manual by design.
Zhang plus an initial is the highest-collision author string in the index. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
Zou W collides with the separately tracked Zou Y laboratory in abbreviated form. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
A two-principal-investigator record; Gil J and Tate EW would need separate watches with separate role claims. Manual until each identity is proven.
Bush AI collides with unrelated authors and this laboratory publishes largely outside the ferroptosis title stream. Manual until an ORCID is proven.
